instruction: How can I combine data from a 'Snapshot' sheet to a 'Registry' sheet, by matching duplicates based on the 'DATE' and 'REF' columns in columns B and C, and add a 'TOTAL' row to sum up the amounts? Additionally, since new ranges with headers will be added to the 'Snapshot' sheet, how do I ensure to delete the old ranges in the 'Registry' sheet before populating the new data? I have given the correct answer of the "STAGE" table in the "Registry" table as a format reference, please help me complete the other answers. Each of the sections in "Registry" should be sorted based on data from lowest to highest, secondary sort key is alphabetical A to Z on column C.
